four teams of the historical neighborhoods of the city play against each other, first in two  ...    ## Where, when and how is Calcio Storico played? Calcio Storico is played in Piazza Santa Croce in Florence. Three matches a year are played, in the last third of June, between four teams representing areas of the city: - San Giovanni - Verdi or Greens
- Santo Spirito - Bianchi or Whites
- Santa Maria Novella - Rossi or Reds - Santa Croce - Azzurri or Blues The four teams compete in colourful medieval costumes. The aim of the game is to take the ball and put it in the net  ...    Tickets are generally sold in late May or early June, but only a few days ahead of the matches. The popularity of the  ...    not online. It gives locals a chance to get tickets first. title: Florence's grand Calcio Storico spectacle on June 14, 15 and 24
highlights:
Florence’s grand Calcio Storico spectacle on June 14, 15 and 24
 ByPamela McCourt Francescone**Wednesday, 04 June 2025 14:33 Florence’s grand Calcio Storico spectacle on June 14, 15 and 24 ## The Calcio Storico Fiorentino spectacle, one of Florence’s most beloved and enduring traditions, will occupy the Piazza Santa Croce square on 14, 15 and 24 June. **Held in Florence’s Santa Croce square** Blending sport, history, and deep-rooted neighborhood pride, this centuries-old event comes alive again this month, culminating in the grand final during the feast day of Florence’s patron saint, San Giovanni. Held in the iconic and central Piazza Santa Croce square, the final match follows two semifinals on June 14 and 15, featuring the four  ...    Giovanni). Each game is preceded by a grand historical parade through the city center, with participants in Renaissance  ...    More than just a sport, the Calcio Storico is a social and cultural ritual that has united Florentines for generations.
